hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, הַמּוֹצִיא לֶחֶם מִן הָאָרֶץ:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, hamotzi lechem min ha'aretz.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who brings forth bread from the earth.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, בּוֹרֵא מִינֵי מְזוֹנוֹת:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, borei minei mezonot.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who creates varieties of nourishment.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, בּוֹרֵא פְּרִי הַגֶּפֶן:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, borei peri hagafen.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who creates the fruit of the vine.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, בּוֹרֵא פְּרִי הָעֵץ:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, borei peri ha'etz.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who creates the fruit of the tree.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, בּוֹרֵא פְּרִי הָאֲדָמָה:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, borei peri ha'adama.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who creates the fruit of the ground.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, שֶׁהַכֹּל נִהְיֶה בִּדְבָרוֹ:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, shehakol nihye bidvaro.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, by whose word all things came to be.

hebrewFull: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְיָ אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, בּוֹרֵא נְפָשׁוֹת רַבּוֹת וְחֶסְרוֹנָן, עַל כָּל מַה שֶּׁבָּרָא לְהַחֲיוֹת בָּהֶם נֶפֶשׁ כָּל חָי. בָּרוּךְ חֵי הָעוֹלָמִים:
translitFull: Baruch Atah Ado-nai Eloheinu Melech ha'olam, borei nefashot rabbot vechesronan, al kol mah shebara lehachayot bahem nefesh kol chai. Baruch chei ha'olamim.
englishFull: Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, Creator of many living beings and their needs, for all that You created with which to sustain the life of every living being. Blessed is He who is the Life of the worlds.

hebrewFull: עַל הַמִּחְיָה וְעַל הַכַּלְכָּלָה… (the full me'ein shalosh)
englishFull: The full me'ein shalosh after-blessing for the five grains.

hebrewFull: עַל הַגֶּפֶן וְעַל פְּרִי הַגֶּפֶן… (the full me'ein shalosh)
translitFull: Al hagefen v'al peri hagefen… (full text)
englishFull: The full me'ein shalosh after-blessing for wine and grape juice.

hebrewFull: עַל הָעֵץ וְעַל פְּרִי הָעֵץ… (the full me'ein shalosh)
translitFull: Al ha'etz v'al peri ha'etz… (full text)
englishFull: The full me'ein shalosh after-blessing for the five fruits.

hebrewFull: בִּרְכַּת הַמָּזוֹן… (the full Grace after Meals)
englishFull: The full Grace after Meals, said after a meal with bread.
